title: White Furry Totem
description: Transforms your totem into a white furry :3
body:
![Meow :333](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VajvXWzg/images/fee843391e7045dcffe8ca54d8629141c37ac7f8.png)

This is a resource pack that replaces a regular totem with a white furry totem :3

## Compatibility with the resource pack:

| Version             | Mods               | Result              |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| Vanilla            | -              | ✅             |
| [Forge](<https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/> 'HELLO,')            | [Optifine](<https://optifine.net/downloads> 'I')              | ✅             |
| [Fabric](<https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/> 'NOT')            | [CIT Resewn](<https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions>  'MURKA!')              | ✅             |
